problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: If Federated learning without data centralization is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Theoretical complexity proof with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
